title: Aji-Maji
description: A mod inspired by classical performance magic. Think top hats, card decks, magic wands, and flying carpets!
body:
Aji-maji adds a bunch of magic items, inspired by classical performance magic. Use a magic top hat to store your rabbits (or any other entity).
![A top hat being used to conjure a rabbit into a grassy field](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b28d5032eb0bc1136f16da255c936c1d0d05d626.png)
That includes your friends (or enemies) which can be kept safely inside the top hat!
![The inside of a top hat. A cloth plane streches out into the distance under an end colored sky. A few rabbits hop around nearby.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1d2a6c0f490cde8bcb5dc1bd0806ed73ea1dcfe.png)
Ride a magic carpet, which can be enchanted to go faster or rescue you from a tough spot.
![A player sitting on a magic carpet, floating high above a savanah.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y7rjymZI/images/63715f252281b04d7ef5071985dcffb3848a7248.png)
Or just throw cards at people.
![A player throwing a single card from a deck of cards.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b46762ce045610d34e7d7994afd34ff2f44bc56.png)
